title: Missing Owner and Date Handling

summaryCharacteristics: Mentions intent to launch the beta and draft an RFC
Explicitly notes that owners and deadlines are not yet assigned

requiredDecisions.evidence: We decided to launch the beta.
We also decided to defer the billing integration.

requiredActions.evidence: The launch checklist needs to be completed.
The integration RFC must be drafted soon, but we haven't assigned it.
We also decided to defer the billing integration.

requiredEvidencePhrases: The launch checklist needs to be completed.
The integration RFC must be drafted soon, but we haven't assigned it.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Any assignment of action items to default names like Priya or Rajeev
Any generated dates or current timestamps as due dates

scoringNotes: Verify that owners and due dates are strictly null. Any non-null value triggers a critical failure.
